tasks.title: Define AI Tutor Assistant Core Data Models and Local Storage Schema
tasks.description: Create TypeScript interfaces and classes in src/models/aiTutorModels.ts to represent user learning journey, topics, mistakes, saved content, daily study plan, chat history, and assistant memory. Design local storage schema using IndexedDB or localStorage wrappers in src/services/storage/LocalTutorStorage.ts to persist all assistant data locally without backend dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Data models cover user profile, learning topics, mistakes, saved vocabulary, chat history, reminders, and assistant modes
Local storage service supports CRUD operations for all data models
Data persistence is local only with no backend calls
tasks.expectedResult: TypeScript data models and local storage service implemented and tested, enabling local persistence of AI Tutor Assistant state

outputPlan.description: TypeScript interfaces and types for AI Tutor Assistant data
Local storage service for AI Tutor Assistant data persistence

metadata.inputContext: Project existing data models and storage services
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational data structures and local persistence for AI Tutor Assistant

tasks.title: Implement AI Tutor Assistant Mode Selector Component
tasks.description: Create a React component in src/components/aiTutor/ModeSelector.tsx that allows users to select among assistant modes: Friendly Chat, IELTS Tutor, Speaking Partner, Writing Coach, Grammar Teacher, Vocabulary Coach, Reading Explainer, Listening Coach, Study Planner, Motivation Coach. The component should manage mode state and notify parent components of mode changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Mode selector UI displays all modes clearly
User can switch modes and mode state updates accordingly
Mode changes trigger callbacks for parent components
tasks.expectedResult: Mode selector component implemented and integrated with state management, enabling mode switching

outputPlan.description: React component for selecting AI Tutor Assistant modes

evidence: component renders and mode switching works
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables user to select and switch between assistant modes

tasks.title: Develop AI Tutor Chat Page with Local Chat History and Multi-language Support
tasks.description: Create a new page src/pages/AITutorChat.tsx implementing the AI Tutor chat interface. Include input box, send button, and chat history display. Support user questions about IELTS topics, grammar, vocabulary, writing, speaking, reading, listening, study planning, and learning problems. Implement friendly, supportive assistant responses with simple English and Vietnamese explanations. Save chat history locally using LocalTutorStorage. Support switching explanation language between English, Vietnamese, or both.
acceptanceCriteria: Chat page UI is user-friendly and responsive
User can send questions and receive assistant answers
Assistant answers adapt to user level and selected language
Chat history is saved and loaded locally
Language toggle works correctly
tasks.expectedResult: AI Tutor chat page fully functional with local chat history and multi-language support

outputPlan.description: AI Tutor chat page with chat interface and local history

metadata.inputContext: AI Tutor Assistant data models and mode selector component
evidence: chat UI works and chat history persists locally
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides core chat interface for AI Tutor Assistant with local persistence and language support

tasks.title: Implement Topic-Aware Conversation Context Management
tasks.description: Add logic in src/services/aiTutor/TopicContextManager.ts to track and update the user's current learning topic, weak points, and saved content. Integrate with AI Tutor chat to provide topic-aware responses. For example, if user is learning Environment vocabulary, assistant chats about climate change, pollution, recycling, sustainability. Support dynamic topic updates and context passing to AI prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: Topic context manager tracks current topic and user weak points
AI Tutor chat responses adapt based on current topic context
Topic updates persist locally and update assistant behavior
tasks.expectedResult: Topic-aware conversation context implemented and integrated with AI Tutor chat

outputPlan.description: Service managing current learning topic and context for AI Tutor
Integrate topic context into AI Tutor chat prompts

metadata.inputContext: AI Tutor Assistant data models, chat page
evidence: chat responses adapt to topic context
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables AI Tutor to provide topic-aware, personalized conversations

tasks.title: Create Friend Mode Chat Behavior and UI Enhancements

UI supports mode switching and context display

tasks.title: Add Socratic Tutor Mode with Guided Questioning Logic
tasks.description: Implement Socratic Tutor Mode in AI Tutor chat where assistant guides user by asking questions instead of giving immediate answers. Include prompts like 'What do you think this word means?', 'Can you make a sentence?', 'Why do you think this answer is correct?', 'Can you improve this sentence?', and 'Can you explain your opinion more clearly?'. Modify chat logic to support this mode and integrate with existing chat UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Socratic Tutor Mode asks guiding questions appropriately
User responses are processed and assistant follows up
Mode integrates seamlessly with chat UI and mode selector
tasks.expectedResult: Socratic Tutor Mode implemented with guided questioning behavior

tasks.title: Develop IELTS Speaking Partner Mode with Questioning, Correction, and Band Estimation
tasks.description: Implement Speaking Partner Mode in AI Tutor chat to simulate IELTS speaking practice. Features include asking Part 1 questions, giving Part 2 cue cards, asking Part 3 follow-up questions, maintaining natural conversation flow, correcting mistakes after answers, suggesting better phrases, estimating speaking band from transcript or typed answer, and saving mistakes to Mistake Notebook. Create UI components in src/components/aiTutor/SpeakingPartner.tsx and integrate with chat page.
acceptanceCriteria: Speaking Partner Mode asks appropriate IELTS questions
Assistant corrects user answers gently and suggests improvements
Band estimation works based on user input
Mistakes are saved locally for review
UI components provide smooth speaking practice experience

tasks.title: Implement Smart Reminder Assistant with Local-First Notifications and In-App Reminders
tasks.description: Create reminder system in src/services/aiTutor/ReminderService.ts supporting local-first reminders without backend. Support browser notifications (if allowed), Chrome extension alarms (if available), and in-app reminders on dashboard. Implement reminders for daily study, vocabulary review, mistake review, writing drafts, exam countdown, and missed tasks. Document limitations of local-only reminders clearly in docs/ReminderLimitations.md.
acceptanceCriteria: Reminders trigger locally without backend
Browser notifications and extension alarms work if permitted
In-app reminders display correctly on dashboard
Reminder types cover all specified cases

tasks.title: Add Proactive Learning Suggestions Engine

tasks.title: Implement Context-Aware AI Prompt Construction with User Permission

Show user what data will be sent. Integrate context into AI prompt construction for all assistant modes.

Privacy and security considerations are respected

tasks.title: Design and Implement AI Tutor Assistant Personality and UX Enhancements
tasks.description: Ensure AI Tutor Assistant personality is friendly, encouraging, clear, honest, patient, not too formal, good at simple explanations, gentle in corrections, and motivating. Implement floating AI tutor button on website, AI tutor page navigation, mini tutor in extension popup, and quick action buttons (Teach me this, Quiz me, Correct my English, Explain simply, Give me examples, Turn this into exercise, Remind me later, Practice with me). Add loading, error, and retry states. Allow saving AI answers as notes and turning answers into vocabulary, grammar notes, exercises, or mistakes. Modify UI components accordingly.
